pi_items.metadata_value: Pacific Northwest Medical Center - IT Support
pi_items.verified_value: Pacific Northwest Medical Center - IT Support
pi_items.source: Task metadata defines the expected company name to be set in FreeScout system settings. The name is synthetic/fictional for this scenario (web search found similar named real entities but not this exact organization).

FreeScout official PHP Timezones wiki (https://github.com/freescout-help-desk/freescout/wiki/PHP-Timezones) explicitly lists 'America/Los_Angeles' as the correct timezone identifier for Pacific Time (US), described as '(GMT-07:00) Pacific Time (US)'.

Task definition specifies setting time format to '12-hour format (with AM/PM)'. The verifier.py checks for PHP date format characters ('a', 'A', 'h', 'g') that indicate 12-hour format. The metadata value '12h' indicates the type/category rather than the exact PHP format string that would be stored in database.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring FreeScout system settings with: (1) Company Name: 'Pacific Northwest Medical Center - IT Support' (synthetic fictional name for task scenario), (2) Timezone: 'America/Los_Angeles' (verified correct identifier for US Pacific Time per FreeScout documentation), (3) Time Format: 12-hour format with AM/PM. All metadata claims align with valid FreeScout configuration options. The dataset is synthetic - it uses a fictional company name and scenario, but the configuration options are real FreeScout features.
